hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx) "$root/node_modules/.bin/biome" check --write "$f" 2>&1 || true;; *.py) uvx ruff format "$f" && uvx ruff check --fix "$f" || true;; esac
